summary: Iteration 10 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 4 specific fixes verified: (1) Resource delete confirmation dialog working, (2) Cold start loading screen exists with proper styling, (3) Test Cases category hidden from sidebar/homepage via internal:true flag, (4) AI Agent test cases have 'Step | Action | Expected Result' table format. 13/13 backend tests passed. All frontend features working.
critical_code_review_comments: Issue 1 FIX VERIFIED: Resource delete uses window.confirm('Delete this resource?') at line 1139
Issue 2 FIX VERIFIED: Cold start loading screen with spinner and messages at lines 1698-1707, CSS styles at lines 34-40
Issue 3 FIX VERIFIED: Test Cases category has internal:true - filtered out via !c.internal at lines 558 and 1039
Issue 4 FIX VERIFIED: Test case documents have 'Step | Action | Expected Result' table format

test_credentials.no_auth: No authentication required. All users are hardcoded as admin.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes from this iteration verified. Test Cases category and 7 subcategories have internal:true flag. Sidebar and HomePage filter with !c.internal. Delete confirmation works for tools. Loading screen shows 'Loading Knowledge Hub...' or 'Connecting to server...' with retry. Test case documents use Step|Action|Expected Result tables.

issue_1_delete_confirmation.evidence: window.confirm('Delete this resource?') at App.js line 1139, verified via Playwright

issue_2_cold_start_loading.description: Loading screen with spinner and appropriate messages
issue_2_cold_start_loading.evidence: Code at lines 1698-1707 shows loading screen with edh-loading class, spinner, and text

issue_3_test_cases_hidden.description: Test Cases category hidden from sidebar and home page
issue_3_test_cases_hidden.evidence: 8 internal categories found via API, filtered with !c.internal at lines 558 and 1039

issue_4_test_case_tables.description: AI Agent test cases have Step|Action|Expected Result format
issue_4_test_case_tables.evidence: Verified via API and screenshot - all test case documents use consistent table format

sidebar_navigation.description: Categories expand/collapse, clicking documents loads them

tools_crud.description: Add, edit, delete resources working with confirmation

settings_page.description: Settings page loads for admin users with user management

ai_chatbot.description: Chatbot FAB visible, panel opens, can send messages

inline_search.description: Search shows categories and documents, clicking navigates

mocked_api_note: User authentication is MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh) with no real login flow
